scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ruthenium/server" "npm run dev -w @ruthenium/web"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n server,web,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ruthenium/server" "npm run dev -w @ruthenium/web" "wait-on tcp:3001 tcp:5173 && npm run dev -w @ruthenium/electron"
